positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial forest scene. The composition features towering, stylized silhouettes of magical trees and ancient flora, interlocking with glowing constellations and nebulae. The central focus is a majestic, stylized crescent moon nestled within a burst of vibrant cosmic dust. Use a deeply saturated color palette dominated by indigo, deep sapphire, ethereal teal, and glowing gold accents. The artwork must have clean, crisp lines and a strong contrast, reminiscent of linocut engraving meets cosmic vaporwave. Minimalist symmetry, centered composition, suitable for apparel print. Studio quality, vector graphic style, bioluminescent glow.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noise, grain, lowres, artifacts, signature, text, watermark, logo, messy, photo, photographic, photorealism, gradient fade, extra limbs, bad anatomy, abstract goo
